subject: Server down - client calls impacted
body: Our main call routing server went offline 20 minutes ago. Client calls are dropping. This is a P1 incident.

subject: Renewal discussion next quarter
body: Our contract is up in Q2. Let's schedule a call sometime next month to talk renewal options.

subject: Minor UI glitch on settings page
body: The settings page has a minor alignment issue on Firefox. Low priority but worth logging.

subject: Platform feedback — impressed!
body: Been using the platform for a month. The analytics dashboard is a game changer for our team.

subject: Security patch required IMMEDIATELY
body: A critical CVE has been disclosed affecting your version. Please patch before end of day or we escalate.

subject: Team lunch logistics
body: For Friday's team lunch, we've booked the Italian place on MG Road. Please RSVP by Wednesday.

subject: Upgrade inquiry — 500 seats
body: We're scaling from 50 to 500 seats. What enterprise options do you have? Need pricing ASAP.

subject: Docs improvement suggestion
body: Your API documentation is mostly great but the authentication section is unclear for OAuth2 flows.

subject: Department restructure update
body: As communicated in the all-hands, the support and ops teams will merge effective May 1st.

subject: Cannot submit expense report
body: The expense portal gives a validation error on the currency field. Blocking my month-end submission.

subject: Production database latency spike
body: DB response time jumped from 12ms to 4000ms after last night's migration. Orders are timing out.

subject: Partnership proposal
body: We'd like to explore a reseller agreement for Southeast Asia. Who should I speak with about commercial terms?

subject: Confusing error after update
body: After the v3.2 update, the dashboard shows an error on load but still works. Confusing but not blocking.

subject: Webinar feedback
body: Attended your webinar on AI integrations. Very informative! Would love a follow-up session on advanced topics.

subject: HR: Leave policy update
body: Please note the updated leave encashment policy effective June 1st. Review attached PDF.

subject: Trial ending — conversion question
body: Our 14-day trial ends tomorrow. What's the best plan for a 20-person team with heavy API usage?

subject: Intermittent login failures
body: About 30% of our users report login failures at peak times (9-10 AM IST). Not constant but impactful.

subject: UX suggestion: onboarding flow
body: The onboarding wizard could be shortened — steps 3 and 4 feel redundant for technical users.

subject: Budget approval needed
body: Requesting approval for Q3 software budget of INR 2.4L. Please sign off by Thursday.

subject: Agent crashing on high load
body: During peak traffic (5000 req/min), the agent process crashes without a log entry. Need urgent fix.

subject: Custom SLA inquiry
body: We require a 99.99% uptime SLA and dedicated support. Can you accommodate this in a custom contract?

subject: Positive review — will recommend
body: Left a 5-star review on G2. Your platform genuinely saved us 10 hours per week on manual tasks.

subject: Office network upgrade schedule
body: IT will be upgrading the office LAN switches this Saturday 2-6 AM. Expect brief interruptions.

subject: File upload silently failing
body: PDF uploads show success but files don't appear in the system. Data may be lost. CHECK IMMEDIATELY.

subject: Case study collaboration
body: We'd love to collaborate on a case study about our 40% efficiency improvement. Who should I contact?

subject: Suggestion: bulk user import
body: We onboard 50+ users quarterly. A CSV bulk import feature would save us significant admin time.

subject: Payroll integration broken
body: The HRMS payroll sync stopped working after the last update. Salary disbursements are at risk.

subject: Compliance document request
body: Please share your SOC 2 Type II report and ISO 27001 certificate for our vendor assessment.

subject: Year-end party planning
body: Volunteers needed to help plan the year-end celebration. Reply to join the committee.

subject: Notification flood bug
body: After enabling integrations, users are receiving hundreds of duplicate email notifications per hour.
